description: Letter to someone addressed as mawlāy al-rayyis. In Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic with the address in Arabic script. Mentions Malīj, al-Maḥalla and Ibn al-Ḥabrāwī, coming to Fustat, and moving to al-Shām. Very faded. Needs further examination. There is an imprint of this letter on verso of CUL Or.1080 J47c (PGPID 19824), which might assist with reading some of the difficult phrases.
